Unintended recipients are directed to securely destroy any materials received. You are hereby notified that the unauthorized disclosure or other unlawful use of this fax or any personal health information is prohibited. To the extent patient information contained in this fax is subject to 42 CFR Part 2, this regulation prohibits unauthorized disclosure of these records. If you received this fax in error, please visit www.athenahealth.com/NotMyFax to notify the sender and confirm that the information will be destroyed. If you do not have internet access, please call 1-888-482-8436 to notify the sender and confirm that the information will be destroyed. Thank you for your attention and cooperation.
